items.name: Fresh Brewed Coffee
items.description: Our medium roast is a classic balance between sweet caramel, nutty chocolate, and tropical fruits.
items.simplified_description: A medium roast coffee with sweet and nutty flavors.

items.name: Waves Au Lait
items.description: Like brewed coffee on steroids: simply select a coffee on tap and we’ll add some deliciously steamed milk.

items.name: Latte
items.description: Espresso mingles with smoothly steamed milk into a sublimely satisfying handcrafted beverage.

items.name: Cappuccino
items.description: A stronger espresso experience than a latte, with densely foamed milk.

items.name: Canadiano
items.description: Our patriotic take on the Americano, watered down espresso.
items.simplified_description: A Canadian version of Americano coffee.

items.name: Espresso
items.description: Our signature espresso blend features strong notes of semi-sweet chocolate and caramel.
items.simplified_description: Strong espresso with chocolate and caramel notes.

items.name: Espresso Macchiato
items.description: Our signature espresso with a smidge of thickly steamed milk.
items.simplified_description: Espresso with a little steamed milk.

items.name: Caramel Macchiato
items.description: Sweet caramel balanced against intense espresso.

items.name: Maple Macchiato
items.description: A tribute to Canada’s legendary syrup.

items.name: Belgian Mocha
items.description: Freshly melted Belgian chocolate with espresso and steamed milk.

items.name: Belgian Hot Chocolate
items.description: Belgian chocolate melted with steamed milk.
items.simplified_description: Hot chocolate made with Belgian chocolate.

items.name: White Chocolate Matcha
items.description: Delicious matcha latte sweetened with Belgian white chocolate.

items.name: Cold Brew
items.description: Bright Costa Rican coffee brewed over ice.

items.name: Iced Latte
items.description: Espresso with notes of chocolate poured over ice and milk.
items.simplified_description: Iced espresso with chocolate and milk.

items.name: Iced Canadiano
items.description: Smooth and bold iced espresso.

items.name: Iced Maple Macchiato
items.description: Iced version of the maple macchiato.

items.name: Iced Caramel Macchiato
items.description: Sweet caramel and vanilla with rich espresso.
items.simplified_description: Iced espresso with caramel and vanilla.

items.name: Iced Belgian Mocha
items.description: Made with real chocolate and double espresso.

items.name: Iced Rooibos Latte
items.description: Pure rooibos tea shaken over ice with milk.

items.name: Iced Matcha Latte
items.description: Naturally unsweetened matcha with milk over ice.

items.name: Organic Loose Leaf Tea
items.description: Varieties include Black, Herbal, White, and Green teas.
items.simplified_description: Different types of loose leaf tea.

items.name: Matcha latte
items.description: Pure Matcha tea whisked with steamed milk.

items.name: London Fog
items.description: Earl Grey tea with steamed milk and vanilla.
items.simplified_description: Earl Grey tea with milk and vanilla.

items.name: Chai latte
items.description: Brewed with organic ingredients and steamed milk.

items.name: Rooibos Canadiano
items.description: Caffeine-free rooibos brewed like espresso.

items.name: Espresso Frapp-eh
items.description: Real ice cream with freshly extracted espresso.

items.name: Fruit Smoothie
items.description: Blended with ice cream, yogurt, or straight fruit.
items.simplified_description: Smoothie made with fruit and ice cream.

items.name: Butter Croissant
items.description: Irresistibly flaky traditional French croissant.

items.description: Chocolate graham crumb base with creamy custard and chocolate.
items.simplified_description: Dessert bar with chocolate and custard.

items.name: Oatmeal Raisin Cookie
items.description: Chewy, warm, packed with wholesome oats and raisins.

items.name: Banana Loaf
items.description: Moist and flavorful banana loaf.

items.name: Lemon Citrus Loaf
items.description: Light and lemony with citrus icing.

items.name: Chocolate Chip Cookie
items.description: Big cookie with three kinds of chocolate chunks.
